markets.question: New Rihanna Album before GTA VI?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Rihanna officially releases a new album before Grand Theft Auto VI is officially released in the US. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If neither occurs by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to 50-50.

For the purposes of this market, "release" refers to the game becoming publicly available for purchase or download in the US. Early access, beta versions, other forms of pre-release availability, or leaks will not count as an official release. If the release is only for certain consoles (e.g. Xbox Series X/S) it will count.

The resolution source for the release of GTA VI is official information from Rockstar Games or its parent company, Take-Two Interactive.

Officially released means that a newly released album is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date.

Re-releases, deluxe editions, compilations, or greatest hits albums will not count, unless they contain at least 50% tracks that have never been officially released in any format prior to the album's release.

The resolution source for the album release will be any official streaming or download site, e.g. Apple Music or Spotify.

events.title: What will happen before GTA VI?
events.description: This is a market on predicting events that will occur before the release of Grand Theft Auto VI.

eventMetadata.context_description: The confirmed May 26, 2026 release date for Grand Theft Auto VI, announced after Rockstar’s latest delay, has intensified trader focus on the narrow window before launch. Industry analysts note that Take-Two’s May 21 earnings call could provide fresh updates on marketing timelines or final polishing, while cultural observers track whether major releases like a new Playboi Carti or Rihanna album, GPT-6, or even geopolitical shifts could unfold first. With the game positioned as a generational event in open-world gaming, historical patterns show Rockstar’s titles dominate pop culture discourse upon arrival, making any pre-release milestone a high-stakes swing factor for market participants.

markets.question: Will Harvey Weinstein be sentenced to no prison time?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the prison sentence, if any, imposed on Harvey Weinstein as part of his ongoing New York retrial (People of the State of New York v. Harvey Weinstein) by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve immediately based on the first sentence rendered in this case, regardless of any appeals. If Weinstein is found not guilty, there is a mistrial, or if the first sentencing does not include any jail or prison time, this market will resolve to "No Prison Time."

If no sentencing takes place by July 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will also resolve to "No Prison Time."

If the sentence falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

For the purposes of this market, it does not matter whether the sentence is concurrent or consecutive to any existing sentence Weinstein is already serving. The market will resolve based on the total prison sentence imposed in this case.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the New York court system or other involved U.S. government sources; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent developments in Harvey Weinstein’s legal saga, particularly the May 15 mistrial in his third New York retrial on the Jessica Mann rape charge, have solidified trader consensus around No Prison Time as the dominant outcome. With the jury deadlocked after two days and prosecutors granted a 30-day window to decide on yet another retrial, the case remains stalled amid ongoing appeals and Weinstein’s documented health challenges. His existing 16-year California sentence and prior New York convictions already shape long-term incarceration expectations, while the current limbo reduces immediate prospects for significant added time. Upcoming hearings in late June could clarify whether charges proceed, but current momentum favors limited or no further penalties in the near term.

events.title: 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NHL Stanley Cup championship.

eventMetadata.context_description: The four remaining teams in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs have shaped current implied probabilities through their regular-season records and playoff paths. Carolina leads at 39.5% after topping the Eastern Conference with strong defensive structure and home-ice advantage in the Eastern Final against Montreal. Colorado sits at 30.9% thanks to its high-powered offense and favorable Western Final matchup versus Vegas. The Golden Knights hold 19.9% on the strength of recent series wins and goaltending depth, while the Canadiens at 10.8% reflect their resilient run to the Eastern Final but tougher road ahead. Trader consensus factors in recent form, rest advantages, and historical conference-final outcomes as the series begin.

eventMetadata.context_description: The four remaining teams in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs have shaped current implied probabilities through their regular-season records and playoff paths. Trader consensus factors in recent form, rest advantages, and historical conference-final outcomes as the series begin.

events.title: 2026 NBA Champion
events.description: This market is to predict the winner of the 2025–26 NBA Finals.

eventMetadata.context_description: The trader consensus reflected in these implied probabilities stems primarily from the Oklahoma City Thunder’s league-best 64-18 regular-season mark and their status as defending champions, bolstered by Shai Gilgeous-Alexander’s MVP-caliber play. The San Antonio Spurs sit close behind on the strength of a 62-20 record and Victor Wembanyama’s historic production, which has carried them through a deep playoff run into the Western Conference Finals where the series is tied 1-1. In the East, the New York Knicks’ 53-29 finish and resilient Game 1 overtime victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers have kept them in contention, while the Cavaliers trail after that same setback despite their solid 52-30 campaign. These developments underscore the Thunder’s slight edge and the Spurs’ realistic title path.

markets.question: Will Spain win the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup winner market shows a tightly bunched field among top national teams, with France's narrow lead reflecting its blend of recent Nations League success, deep squad options, and proven major-tournament pedigree. Spain and England sit close behind, supported by strong European qualifying campaigns, youthful depth, and favorable pre-tournament scheduling that limits travel fatigue across the North American venues. This market will resolve according to the national team that wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

If at any point it becomes impossible for this team to win the FIFA World Cup based on the rules of FIFA (e.g., they are eliminated in the knockout stage), this market will resolve immediately to “No”.

If the 2026 FIFA World Cup is permanently canceled or has not been completed by October 13, 2026, 11:59 PM this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from FIFA, however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Xi Jinping out before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if China's General Secretary of the Communist Party, Xi Jinping, is removed from power for any length of time between July 3, 2025, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

CCP General Secretary Xi Jinping will be considered removed from power if he announces his resignation from his role as General Secretary, or is otherwise dismissed, detained, disqualified, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from fulfilling his duties as General Secretary within this market's timeframe.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the named individual wins and accepts the 2028 nomination of the Democratic Party for U.S. president. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Democratic Party sources.

Any replacement of the democratic nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the wide-open contest for the 2028 Democratic presidential nomination, traders assign Gavin Newsom the leading implied probability amid a fragmented field where no contender exceeds one-quarter support. Name recognition, executive records, and positioning on issues such as economic policy and party coalitions differentiate the top names, including Kamala Harris and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. Midterm results, early primary polling, fundraising totals, and endorsements from party officials remain key variables that could consolidate support behind one outcome before formal voting begins. The current pricing reflects broad uncertainty typical of nomination markets years ahead of the convention.
